name: CVEs | Security | openEuler
description: The list of Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) relevant to openEuler, helping you stay updated on security issues.

about.name: Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures
about.description: A list of publicly disclosed cybersecurity vulnerabilities tracked and managed by the openEuler Security Center.

name: openEuler CVE List
description: A searchable and filterable dataset of Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) affecting openEuler, including severity ratings, statuses, affected packages, and release dates.

variableMeasured.name: Synopsis
variableMeasured.description: A brief description of the CVE

variableMeasured.name: Severity
variableMeasured.description: Severity level: Critical, High, Medium, Low, or N/A

variableMeasured.name: Status
variableMeasured.description: Fix status: Fixed, Unaffected, Affected, or Under Investigation

variableMeasured.name: Packages
variableMeasured.description: The software packages affected by the CVE

variableMeasured.name: Release Date
variableMeasured.description: The date the CVE was published

variableMeasured.name: Updated At
variableMeasured.description: The date the CVE entry was last updated
